news.title: RBI sold $6 billion in May to defend oil-hit Indian rupee, data shows
news.description: The Reserve Bank of India sold $6.1 billion in foreign exchange during May.  This intervention occurred as oil prices surged, pushing the rupee to a record low.  The central bank also implemented policy measures to encourage dollar inflows into India.

news.title: Oil rally weighs on Indian bonds, value buyers limit fall
